products.name: Meridian Workflow Engine
products.description: No-code workflow automation platform for enterprise business processes. 1,200 active enterprise clients.

products.name: Meridian Analytics Hub
products.description: Self-serve analytics and reporting for operational data. Integrates with Workflow Engine.

products.name: Meridian Connect
products.description: iPaaS layer with 200+ pre-built connectors. Enables workflow engine to integrate with third-party tools.

products.name: Meridian Vault
products.description: Secure document storage with versioning, approvals, and audit trails for compliance-heavy industries.

products.name: Meridian Scheduler
products.description: AI-assisted shift scheduling and capacity planning for operations teams.

products.name: Meridian Insights (Legacy)
products.description: First-generation reporting tool. Being phased out in favour of Analytics Hub by Q3 2026.
